description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a flat, wood-paneled roof and a white exterior. The front features a wide driveway leading to a garage, a central entryway with a covered porch, and a landscaped area with a tree and shrubs. Large, arched windows dominate the side facade, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The house has multiple sections with varying roof heights, creating a dynamic and layered appearance. The rear and side views reveal additional windows and a spacious layout, suggesting multiple rooms and living spaces. The overall design is clean, geometric, and emphasizes open, airy living with a blend of natural and modern materials.
description: A spacious, modern two-story house with a flat wood-paneled roof, white exterior, large arched windows, and a prominent driveway with landscaped entry.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, garage, and landscaped area with a tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting three large arched windows and the wood-paneled roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows and the extended flat roof sections.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with a clear look at the driveway, garage, and entryway landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large arched windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered entryway with a wide door, steps, and landscaped approach
